item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
plan='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06/migration/plan.json'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$plan" --session scenario-06-owner-dryrun --meta >/dev/null
jq -r '"'([\"dry_run_first\",(.dry_run_first|type),(.dry_run_first|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"owner\",(.owner|type),.owner]|@tsv)' \""'$plan"
jq -e '"'(.dry_run_first|type)==\"boolean\" and .dry_run_first==true and (.owner|type)==\"string\" and .owner==\"data-platform\"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'dry_run_first_exact=PASS\\n'
printf 'owner_exact=PASS\\n'
printf 'PARSED_TYPE_AND_STRING_CHECK=PASS\\n'"
